 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75982549</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Hungary: Magyar launches anti-Orban election campaign]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T20:43:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T20:43:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/hungary-magyar-launches-anti-orban-election-campaign/a-75982549?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Peter Magyar's opposition Tisza party is pledging to combat corruption in one of the European Union's poorest countries and reverse Budapest's pivot towards Russia.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75982195</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Trump: 'Board of Peace' backers pledge $5 Billion for Gaza]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T17:31:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T17:31:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/trump-board-of-peace-backers-pledge-5-billion-for-gaza/a-75982195?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[US President Donald Trump said the Board of Peace’s member states have committed billions of dollars to Gaza’s reconstruction, as well as thousands of personnel to a UN-authorized stabilization force.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75981875</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Europe looks to shore up own defenses amid US uncertainty]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T17:22:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T17:22:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/europe-looks-to-shore-up-own-defenses-amid-us-uncertainty/a-75981875?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[NATO remains a vital security umbrella for Europe, but self-reliance and mutual defense was a recurring theme for the continent's leaders during the annual Munich Security Conference.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75981876</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Israeli government approves new West Bank land policy]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T17:19:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T17:19:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/israeli-government-approves-new-west-bank-land-policy/a-75981876?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The move, which eases land purchases for Israeli settlers anywhere in the occupied West Bank, has sparked international criticism. The Palestinian Authority describes it as de facto annexation.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75828665</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Nature reconsidered: why it's making us anxious]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T15:51:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T15:51:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/nature-reconsidered-why-it-s-making-us-anxious/a-75828665?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[As contact with the outdoors declines, discomfort with wild spaces is growing. Scientists tracking the rise of nature anxiety have some ideas on how to reconnect without feeling overwhelmed.]]></summary>
  <category term="Environment"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75981413</id>
  <title><![CDATA[MSC: With Iran in crisis, is Europe just a spectator?]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T15:01:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T15:01:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/msc-with-iran-in-crisis-is-europe-just-a-spectator/a-75981413?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[At this year's Munich Security Conference, Iran's exiled Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi has urged European leaders to help Iranians topple the Iranian regime. But does Europe have any leverage to deliver on this?]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75980359</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Marco Rubio visits Trump allies in Eastern Europe]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T14:16:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T14:16:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/marco-rubio-visits-trump-allies-in-eastern-europe/a-75980359?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The US Secretary of State is on a two-day trip to Slovakia and Hungary, whose leaders have close ties with Trump. Both countries are being courted to cut their reliance on Russia for energy in favor of US alternatives.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75934648</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Prague exhibition documents Slovak National Gallery decline]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T11:00:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T11:00:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/prague-exhibition-documents-slovak-national-gallery-decline/a-75934648?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A Prague exhibition called "Free National Gallery — Description of a Struggle" details the political dispute over culture in neighboring Slovakia under Robert Fico. It carries an implicit warning for Czech culture, too.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75938790</id>
  <title><![CDATA[MSC: EU eyeing new security strategy, says Kaja Kallas]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T10:24:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T10:24:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/msc-eu-eyeing-new-security-strategy-says-kaja-kallas/live-75938790?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[EU foreign policy chief, Kaja Kallas, says the new strategy will address "all dimensions of European security" amid a more hostile geopolitical era.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75966415</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany news: Right-wing violence rises in 2025]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T09:31:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T09:31:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-news-right-wing-violence-rises-in-2025/live-75966415?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Germany has recorded more cases of violent right-wing crime in 2025 than the previous year. The Berlin Film Festival has defended itself amid a controversy on its stance toward politics. DW has more.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75976951</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Australia to spend $2.8 billion on new nuclear subs facility]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T08:05:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T08:05:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/australia-to-spend-2-8-billion-on-new-nuclear-subs-facility/a-75976951?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Australia has announced the initial funding to build a new submarine construction yard in Osborne under the AUKUS security pact.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75975947</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Nigeria: Dozens killed in attacks on 3 villages]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T04:44:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T04:44:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/nigeria-dozens-killed-in-attacks-on-3-villages/a-75975947?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A group of gunmen attacked three villages in Nigeria in a dawn raid. At least 30 people have died and several are reportedly missing.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75975774</id>
  <title><![CDATA[France assembles magistrate team to examine 'Epstein files']]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T04:00:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T04:00:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/france-assembles-magistrate-team-to-examine-epstein-files/a-75975774?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A team of magistrates will search the so-called "Epstein files" to identify any further possible offences. The case of French modelling agent Jean-Luc Brunel is to be thoroughly re-examined.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75975353</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Nigeria's Argungu Fishing Festival back after 6 years]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-15T00:25:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-15T00:25:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/nigeria-s-argungu-fishing-festival-back-after-6-years/a-75975353?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Thousands of local fishermen were making waves again at the UNESCO-listed fishing festival in Kebbi state. The annual event has not been held for the past 6 years due to regional insecurity.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75975192</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Cuba's annual cigar fair postponed amid US oil blockade]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-14T23:17:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-14T23:17:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/cuba-s-annual-cigar-fair-postponed-amid-us-oil-blockade/a-75975192?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Cuba has been grappeling with worsening fuel shortages as the US prevents oil shipments to the island nation. Organizers did not immediately set a new date for the Habanos Festival.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75974523</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Burglars ransack safe-deposit boxes in German bank heist]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-14T20:21:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-14T20:21:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/burglars-ransack-safe-deposit-boxes-in-german-bank-heist/a-75974523?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Police said they had not identified the perpetrators or established what was stolen. Emergency workers found an unknown liquid on the doors of the bank but said it did not pose a health risk.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75974022</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Orban says EU bigger threat to Hungary than Russia]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-14T18:35:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-14T18:35:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/orban-says-eu-bigger-threat-to-hungary-than-russia/a-75974022?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Hungarian PM Viktor Orban accused the EU of propping up Peter Magyar's Tisza opposition party. Hungary's longest-serving prime minister is facing his biggest electoral challenge in years.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75973922</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Ukraine's Zelenskyy at MSC: Putin is a 'slave to war']]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-14T17:54:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-14T17:54:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/ukraine-s-zelenskyy-at-msc-putin-is-a-slave-to-war/a-75973922?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Almost four years after Russia launched its invasion of Ukraine, peace is nowhere in sight. At the Munich Security Conference, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiyy said his country needed more weapons — fast.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75844380</id>
  <title><![CDATA[As the telephone turns 150, are we hanging up on phone calls?]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-14T16:25:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-14T16:25:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/as-the-telephone-turns-150-are-we-hanging-up-on-phone-calls/a-75844380?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Today, 150 years after the invention of the telephone, it has never been easier to call someone. But in some ways, and for some people, picking up the phone is still a very hard thing to do.]]></summary>
  <category term="Culture"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75925338</id>
  <title><![CDATA[AI-fueled chip shortage drives up smartphone prices]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-14T16:00:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-14T16:00:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/ai-fueled-chip-shortage-drives-up-smartphone-prices/a-75925338?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The era of cheap data storage is ending. Artificial intelligence is pushing chip prices higher and exacerbating supply shortages. Anyone buying a new smartphone in 2026 should brace for higher prices.]]></summary>
  <category term="Business"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75970369</id>
  <title><![CDATA[EU leaders welcome US tone shift in Rubio's Munich speech]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-14T14:10:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-14T14:10:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/eu-leaders-welcome-us-tone-shift-in-rubio-s-munich-speech/a-75970369?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[While European leaders cautiously welcomed a softer tone from the US at the Munich Security Conference, American independence and the "Trumpian narrative" remained top of mind for Secretary of State Marco Rubio.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
</feed>
